name: electroCore, Inc.
summary: PART I Item 1. Our Business Background and Overview electroCore is a bioelectronic technology company whose mission is to improve health and quality of life through innovative non-invasive bioelectronic technologies. Our two leading commercial products are gammaCore non-invasive vagus nerve stimulation, or nVNS, and Quell Fibromyalgia, or Quell. We also sell our Truvaga and TAC-STIM products, which are handheld, personal-use consumer products, developed to promote general wellness and human perf...
